note: Committed, curated ground-truth corpus for H3.NET.Native interop conformance tests. Angular values are DEGREES; cells are zero-padded 16-hex strings (ulong). Doubles are full precision. Regenerate with tools/gen-fixtures/gen_fixtures.py (core corpus) and tools/gen-fixtures/gen_inspection_fixtures.py (index_digits + icosahedron_faces; reuses the same sample_cells corpus). The nightly CI sweep covers the large/exhaustive cases; this corpus is intentionally modest.
